title: Project Manager, Production Services
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Mediacorp is Singapore's largest content creator and national media network, operating a suite of TV channels, radio stations, and multiple digital platforms. Its mission is to engage, entertain, and enrich audiences by harnessing the power of creativity.

We are committed to creating an inclusive and diverse workplace where talent thrives. Our hiring decisions are made based on merit and fit-to-role. If you have a disability or special need which requires accommodation to participate in the recruitment process, please inform us when you submit your online application. We will be happy to support as necessary.

Thank you for your interest and application to this role. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

RESPONSIBILITIES

The project manager will be responsible for planning, executing, and finalizing projects for broadcast related systems according to strict deadlines and within budget. The role will manage resources and coordinate with members from various business units, stakeholders, and vendors to ensure successful project delivery. The role will also oversee and review the resiliency of the newsroom operations workflows.

Responsibilities:

  • Plan and execute projects from start to finish, including developing project plans, defining project scope, and creating schedules.
  • Monitor project progress and ensure that projects are completed within budget, on schedule, and according to quality standards.
  • Manage resources and coordinate with members from various business units, internal and external stakeholders, and vendors to ensure successful project delivery.
  • Identify project risks and develop strategies to mitigate them.
  • Ensure that all project documentation is accurate, up-to-date, and properly maintained.
  • Communicate project progress, issues, and risks to stakeholders and senior management
  • Facilitate project meetings and manage project team members to ensure they are meeting their responsibilities.
  • Conduct project reviews and develop recommendations for improving project delivery processes.
  • Provide direction and support to project team members.
  • Ensure compliance with all applicable regulations, standards, and guidelines.
  • Engage various business units within the newsroom and company to oversee and maintain the business continuity workflows.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Bachelor's degree in a related field, such as project management, business administration, or engineering
  • At least 5-7 years of experience managing complex projects.
  • Relevant broadcast industry experience is preferred.
  • Project management certification, such as PMP or equivalent is highly preferred.
  • Excellent organizational, communication, and leadership skills
  • Proven ability to manage and motivate teams to deliver projects on time and within budget.
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
  • Proficient in project management software and tools
  • Ability to work well under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
  • Demonstrated ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously
  • Work with different business units to provide technical solutions to enhance existing operation and setup.
Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Mediacorp Pte. Ltd.

postedCompany.name: HYPERSCAL SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.

hiringCompany.description:
Mediacorp is Singapore’s leading media company with the most complete range of platforms, spanning television, radio, newspapers, magazines, movies, digital and out-of-home media.

It pioneered the development of Singapore’s broadcasting industry, with the broadcast of Radio in 1936 and Television in 1963. Today, Mediacorp has over 50 products and brands in four languages (English, Mandarin, Malay and Tamil), reaching out to all adults in Singapore every week.

Initiatives in the new digital space include Internet TV-on-demand, High Definition TV broadcast and Over-the-Top (OTT) interactive services.

Beyond Singapore, Mediacorp is an active regional player through co-productions in TV dramas and movies, magazines publishing, as well as Channel NewsAsia International, one of the first Asian-owned English news channels.

Our financial and strategic relationship in the region includes International Media Corporation in Vietnam, which was set up to develop and produce television entertainment and economic news content. Mediacorp also has a stake in Singapore-based retail firm Reebonz, one of the region’s fastest growing luxury online retailers and a majority stake in Cubinet Interactive, a Malaysian digital games publisher.

Winner of numerous international awards and accolades including Asian Television Awards’ Terrestrial Broadcaster of the Year, Mediacorp’s mission is to engage, entertain and enrich audiences by harnessing the power of creativity.
hiringCompany.name: MEDIACORP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
